hero.title: See how PixtoPay KYC can be integrated into your system in minutes.
hero.subtitle: Interactive identity verification demo via iframe — with face recognition, documents, and automated compliance.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four ways to integrate PixtoPay KYC into your system, from quick implementation to full control.

quickCards.embeddedBody: User stays on your page. Result via real-time postMessage. Recommended for web portals and SPAs.
quickCards.redirectBody: KYC opens in a new tab or webview. Result comes back in the redirectUrl querystring. Ideal for mobile and direct links.

api.title: Direct API integration
api.description: Use our API directly in your system

iframe.title: Iframe with PostMessage
iframe.description: Fast iframe integration with real-time events

redirect.title: Redirect (External URL)
redirect.description: Send the user straight to the KYC page and receive the result via redirect to your URL. Ideal for mobile, webviews, and flows outside your domain.
features: Ideal for mobile apps (webview) and direct links
Fallback to postMessage if the URL is invalid

0.title: User starts verification
0.description: Document capture and selfie with facial biometrics

1.title: Automated analysis
1.description: AI checks authenticity and facial similarity

2.title: Results in the dashboard
2.description: Status, metrics, and compliance data in real time

flow.title: KYC process flow — full overview
flow.subtitle: From integration to final result — everything connected in a continuous flow that’s simple to operate.
flow.ctaSuffix: * We recommend running verification on your phone (camera and location access).

1.title: Create integration
1.subtitle: Generate your Public Key and configure domains
highlights: Generate a Public Key in the backoffice

2.title: Create session (register)
2.subtitle: CPF → GUID for onboarding or liveness
highlights: Receive a GUID and session validity

3.title: Open the verification flow
3.subtitle: Iframe (embedded) or redirect in a new tab
highlights: Iframe: load the link with allow camera; geolocation
Redirect: pass redirectUrl and state in the KYC URL
Without iframe, the result comes back via the callback URL

footer.tagline: A complete identity verification solution for fintechs and businesses.
